Hardware Component File

CLUSTER_XBA_LR2_V2.8

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference CLUSTER_XBA_LR2_V2.8_20141212T095848.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 743
Receive ID 763
Functional Addr 51
Functional Name Tableau de bord

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 2 Entries 
[

    "supplier": "0000",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
